history.subject: Adelic RR: H¹(C,𝒪) as the 2-affine-cover Čech cokernel — k-linear bridge HModule 1 ≃ cechCohomology 1 (conditional on the HasCechToHModuleIso Leray gate, via the iter-050 comparison + iter-034 universe bridge at ⊤=⨆𝒰), plus the concrete difference-of-restrictions cokernel Ȟ¹ = Γ(U₁∩U₂)/(Γ(U₁)+Γ(U₂)) and its H⁰=L(D) gluing kernel with the overlap-agreement characterisation
Add mono basis-locality criterion and Stacks 00HL left-tensor form for flat base change of the kernel ideal

adelic RR substrate (N1-N3): point valuation v_P and order = -log∘v_P, the order ultrametric, section subgroups Γ(U,𝒪(D)) with L(D)=global sections, Dedekind-chart gate + fraction/Noetherian chart wrappers, and finiteness of non-integral places on a Dedekind chart
Serre twist P0.2(A): away-fraction bridge for both descent legs, and the forward graded-separation map (a degree-m form gives a compatible chart family)
Serre twist P0.2(C forward)+P0.3: additive embedding of degree-m forms into Gamma(O(m)), and the coordinate global sections x_j (O(1)) with their chart restriction identity Xj/Xi
Serre twist: the degree-m forms embed injectively into Gamma(O(m)) (formChart/formSectionHom injective over the domain ℤ[X], Nonempty index)
Register the adelic Riemann-Roch lane modules (Adelic/Substrate, Adelic/Cokernel, Adelic/P1BaseCase) in the root import list; full library build green (8676 jobs).
Affine heart of the support descent: a f.g. module M over R is f.g. and faithful over R/Ann_R(M).
